:: CONTROL MATRIX
FLOW CONDITIONS
INLET VELOCITY U-INF45 M/S
YAW ANGLE [TURNTABLE]0.0 DEG
LBM SOLVER D2Q9 + LES
REYNOLDS TARGET8000
LBM STEPS / FRAME2
LATTICE GRID
SECTION PLANES
PLAN SLICE Y=0.43M
PROFILE SLICE Z=0.00M
FIELD MODE
SMOKE RAKE / STREAKLINES
SMOKE ENABLE
SEED COUNT1800
TRAIL SEGMENTS12
EMITTER
TEST ARTICLE
SURFACE FINISH
EXECUTION
REF DIAGRAM
IN TEST SECTION 16M OUT +------------------------------+ U>> PLAN SLICE [LBM 2D] >> U>> .__/[F1]\__. >> +=====[ROLLING BELT 1.25U]=====+ YAW TURNTABLE +/-20 DEG
SCENARIO
DISCRETIZATION
PARTICLE COUNT N4000
DAM COLUMN WIDTH0.90 M
STILL WATER DEPTH0.38 M
PISTON WAVEMAKER
STROKE AMPLITUDE0.16 M
FREQUENCY0.70 HZ
BEACH RAMP 1:2.9
PBF SOLVER
CONSTRAINT ITERATIONS3
SUBSTEPS / FRAME1
XSPH VISCOSITY0.08
GRAVITY9.81 M/S2
SCALAR FIELD
EXECUTION
REF DIAGRAM
